turns.speaker: Patient
turns.text: I've googled my symptoms for hours and I'm terrified it's something fatal.

turns.speaker: Nurse
turns.text: I hear how scared you are. Let's go through what you're actually experiencing.

turns.speaker: Patient
turns.text: But what if the tests miss it? I keep imagining the worst and I can't sleep.

turns.speaker: Nurse
turns.text: Those fears are exhausting. We'll take this step by step together.
